---
title: "main"
author: "Caroline Lebrun-Sabalot, Pierre Ripoll, Matéo Garbe"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    theme: cosmo
execute: 
    echo: false
---
```{r}
packages <- c("dplyr", "ggplot2", "reticulate", "rdrobust")

# Installer seulement ceux qui ne sont pas déjà installés
install_if_missing <- function(pkg) {
  if (!requireNamespace(pkg, quietly = TRUE)) {
    install.packages(pkg)
  }
}

lapply(packages, install_if_missing)
```

```{r}
#| output: false
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(reticulate)
library(dotenv)
```

```{r}
# Charger les fonctions
source("projet3A/functions/main_functions.R")
#commenter la ligne ci-dessous si Matéo
dotenv::load_dot_env("projet3A/.env")
# Télécharger le CSV
remote_path <- "RDD/df_RDD_main_BC_full.csv"
gdf_RDD<-get_s3_csv("mgarbe",remote_path)

```

# Balanced Checks 

```{r}
#| output: false

#récupérer l'objet Python
seuil <- 8
gdf_RDD_seuil <- gdf_RDD %>%filter(abs(delta_score_1) < seuil)
```

::: {.panel-tabset}


## Population

::: {.columns}

### 2014

```{r}
plot_rdd(gdf_RDD_seuil, outcome_var='BC_pop',e='2014_muni')
```

### 2020

```{r}
plot_rdd(gdf_RDD_seuil, outcome_var='BC_pop',e='2020_muni')
```

:::

## Densité de population

::: {.columns}

### 2014

```{r}
plot_rdd(gdf_RDD_seuil, outcome_var='BC_dens_pop',e='2014_muni')
```

### 2020

```{r}
plot_rdd(gdf_RDD_seuil, outcome_var='BC_dens_pop',e='2020_muni')
```

:::

## Chômage

::: {.columns}

### 2014

```{r}
plot_rdd(gdf_RDD_seuil, outcome_var='BC_taux_chom',e='2014_muni')
```

### 2020

```{r}
plot_rdd(gdf_RDD_seuil, outcome_var='BC_taux_chom',e='2020_muni')
```

:::

## Emploi

::: {.columns}

### 2014

```{r}
plot_rdd(gdf_RDD_seuil, outcome_var='BC_taux_emploi',e='2014_muni')
```

### 2020

```{r}
plot_rdd(gdf_RDD_seuil, outcome_var='BC_taux_emploi',e='2020_muni')
```


# Régressions

## Avec kernel uniforme
```{r}
rdd_unif = compute_rdd(gdf_RDD_seuil,
                        outcome_var = "surface_creee", 
                        kernel_choisi = "uni",
                        election = "2020_muni")
rdd_unif$Estimate
rdd_unif$pv
```


## Avec kernel triangulaire
```{r}
rdd_tri = compute_rdd(gdf_RDD_seuil,
                        outcome_var = "surface_creee", 
                        kernel_choisi = "tri",
                        election = "2014_muni")
print(rdd_tri)
rdd_tri$Estimate
rdd_tri$pv
```


```{r}

head(gdf_RDD_seuil%>%filter(election=="2020_muni"))
```


## Avec kernel uniforme
```{r}
rdd_unif = compute_rdd(gdf_RDD_seuil,
                        outcome_var = "surface_creee", 
                        kernel_choisi = "uni")
rdd_unif$Estimate
rdd_unif$pv
```

:::
:::
